path_classification.auth_credential_lookup: not primary; small table lookup, low EXPLAIN cost
path_classification.candidate_selection_query: involved; indexed but still fetches a 300-row pool per request
path_classification.connection_saturation: not primary; DB connections peaked at worker limit 20 and normalized to 1, with no blocked locks
path_classification.delivery_history_grouped_lookup: primary CPU suspect; two metric reads run per successful request and delivery_item_metrics planned a deliveries Seq Scan in the sanitized EXPLAIN
path_classification.delivery_insert: not primary; 7 active samples, no wait/lock dominance
path_classification.diagnostics_logging: not on successful hot path except selection_decisions insert; not dominant in sampler
path_classification.entitlement_lookup: not primary; small table lookup, low EXPLAIN cost
path_classification.missing_indexes: not proven; expected 011 selection/delivery indexes are present
path_classification.quota_reserve_update: not primary in this repro; no locks, only 2 active INSERT INTO quota_usage samples, max age 0.005s
path_classification.selection_decision_insert: not primary; 3 active samples, no wait/lock dominance
path_classification.too_many_roundtrips: secondary contributor; successful route still performs about 9 DB executions across auth, read/selection and write sections

cpu_heavy_path.primary_path: bounded candidate selection plus delivery-history grouped metric lookups

existing_report_analysis.cpu_timeline_from_existing_artifacts: not_captured; only max API/Postgres CPU and sample_count are present

latency_shape_from_existing_artifacts.inference: The high p50 together with high p95 indicates a broad elevated-latency window, not only isolated tail spikes; the live short repro confirms a broad elevated plateau after warm-up.
latency_shape_from_existing_artifacts.reason: The existing reports store aggregate percentiles and sampler maxima, but not ordered per-request latency or per-sample CPU timeline.

existing_report_analysis.per_consumer_distribution: not_captured in existing reports; configured profile was 20 isolated consumers and 1200 target requests, so planned mean was 60 requests/consumer

remediation_plan.action: Reduce CANDIDATE_POOL_LIMIT from 300 to 100-150 for production, then remeasure p95/CPU before Stage 4/Stage 5.
remediation_plan.basis: Every live response had candidate_count 300; read path saturated Postgres CPU without locks.

remediation_plan.action: Precompute or incrementally maintain item and theme/pattern delivery metrics instead of grouped reads per /next request.
remediation_plan.basis: delivery_item_metrics and delivery_cell_metrics together have higher planned cost than candidate selection; delivery_item_metrics planned a deliveries Seq Scan.

remediation_plan.action: Collapse candidate fetch and metric enrichment into one bounded SQL shape or reuse the candidate CTE once, so each request does fewer DB executions.
remediation_plan.basis: Current successful route performs auth lookup, consumer lookup, entitlement lookup, candidate fetch, item metrics, cell metrics, quota upsert, delivery insert and decision insert.

remediation_plan.action: Use short TTL/process-local cache for active consumer and entitlement metadata after credential validation, if operationally acceptable.
remediation_plan.basis: Not primary, but repeated on every request and visible in sampler.

remediation_plan.action: Make non-critical selection_decisions slimmer or asynchronous after delivery durability if the read-path fix is insufficient.
remediation_plan.basis: Not root cause now, but still one synchronous write per successful delivery.

remediation_plan.action: Introduce request-scoped connection reuse or an explicit pool/concurrency cap if CPU remains high after read-path reduction.
remediation_plan.basis: Connections peaked at 20 and normalized, so saturation is not proven, but connection churn remains avoidable overhead.

sampler_design.sanitization: No literal values, raw headers, raw keys, DB URLs or quiz content are stored. SQL is reduced to operation/table query types.

verification.no_secrets_scan: python3 tools/no_secrets_scan.py -> No committed secrets detected.
verification.python_unittest: python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -> OK, 380 tests
verification.targeted_scan: passed for raw keys, DB URL, secret header values, private keys and quiz content markers in new/updated reports
